name: Rotel Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Rotel Tomatoes with Green Chiles (10 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and season the chicken.
2. Save 1-1/2 quarts of broth for another use.
3. Cook spaghetti in the reserved broth; drain but do not rinse.
4. In a Dutch oven or heavy pan, saute bell peppers, onions, celery, and mushrooms in butter until tender.
5. Add diced tomatoes and Worcestershire sauce; simmer for about 15 minutes to let flavors blend.
6. Stir in cooked spaghetti, cubed chicken, and grated cheddar cheese.
7. Simmer for another 15-20 minutes until cheese melts and the dish is bubbly.
Note: Flavors blend better if this is prepared ahead of time and refrigerated. This recipe has evolved over the years in our kitchen. You can adjust the amount of various vegetables to suit your taste, and some versions include English peas or use macaroni instead of spaghetti.
